query: SELECT name, packageQuantity, packagePrice, pricePerKgOrUnit, unitType, packageType, packageSize FROM ingredients WHERE name LIKE '%Farina%Frit%' OR name LIKE '%farina%frit%'
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user AQnpkq2FC6cpfGo.root --database UyJAnBG4RdjFPnrCDJUrf4 --execute SELECT name, packageQuantity, packagePrice, pricePerKgOrUnit, unitType, packageType, packageSize FROM ingredients WHERE name LIKE '%Farina%Frit%' OR name LIKE '%farina%frit%'
